description: Auth setup wizard fix + Prisma enum generator - database/config files below noise threshold
rationale: setup-view.tsx under modules/auth/ = auth (8 lines, above threshold). schema.prisma = database (1 line, below NOISE_THRESHOLD=5). package.json = config (3 lines, below threshold). yarn.lock = config (2 lines, below threshold). Only 1 active domain (auth) = PASS.
notes: Noise threshold correctly filters out trivial database/config changes. The conflict detection hypothesis is not exercised here because the files don't have enough lines to matter.
